required_proofs: Real input: actual file bytes, actual compressed packets
Real runtime: actual D3D11 API call, actual WASAPI API call, actual PCM conversion
Real output: actual texture upload, actual PCM samples written
Real assertion: assert on output properties, not just success flag
Inspector evidence: Inspector snapshot records the real path
Scope proof: no forbidden terms in new code
v10_contract_pass_items_must_become_runt: V10-009: D3D11 upload stub → real D3D11 upload (LRD-004)
V10-010: Presenter stub → real presenter boundary (LRD-005)
V10-011: PCM stub → real PCM conversion (LRD-006)

redline_gate_plan.allowlist_rules: Allow forbidden words only in Forbidden Scope, Known Limitations, Next Recommendation, or explicit CONTRACT_PASS explanation

classification_options: RUNTIME_PASS: All local runtime boundaries pass with real evidence
CONTRACT_PASS: Interface contracts proven but not runtime
FAIL: Required runtime proof missing or conflicting
report_requirements: HEAD: commit hash after local repair
forbidden_claims: Never claim ALL PROVIDERS RUNTIME VERIFIED
Never claim full playback closure without all providers
